response.justification: Bogdan is a strong candidate despite not having recent professional C++ experience. His extensive work building high-performance, low-latency systems with DLang is a very strong proxy for the required systems programming mindset. Critically, he founded and continues to develop GISCollective, an open-source geospatial data platform, which demonstrates deep, practical experience and passion for the exact domain of this role. His background in distributed systems and data integration, combined with his proactive, project-driven nature, suggests he could quickly become a valuable contributor.
strengths: Extensive experience building a geospatial data platform (GISCollective), showing direct domain expertise.
Deep systems programming knowledge demonstrated through multiple projects and professional work in DLang, a language similar to C++.
Proven ability to build and operate high-throughput, low-latency microservices.
concerns: Primary required skill, C++, is not a recent area of focus; professional C++ experience is brief and from 2015.
Recent roles have been heavily focused on full-stack web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than backend data pipelines.
Resume contains a significant typo, listing a current job start date in the future (April 2025), which raises questions about attention to detail.
